[MONDAY]: A SACRED RECLAMATION ✓
Day 1 of 30
A morning — The Release
✓

You are not a backup plan for your own life.

My thoughts
My implementation plan
B afternoon — The Radical Center
✓

Your needs are not an inconvenience.

My thoughts
My implementation plan
C evening — Welcome Home
✓

You survived every hard day before this one.

My thoughts
My implementation plan
D Your aphorism — good night☾
✓

Close the day in your own words. Let this be the line you carry into sleep.

Why this aphorism
My implement this
❦   THIS BOOK IS ONLY FOR ME  |  Kai Greatwhite  |  Day 1 / 30   ❦
